note: Accepted findings after security hardening migration 2026-06-11. New errors are blocked; warnings above SEC_WARN_THRESHOLD also block.

findings.name: Signed-In Users Can Execute SECURITY DEFINER Function
findings.accepted: Required for user-facing RPCs (apply_coupon, create_order, get_public_profiles, get_leaderboard_profiles, has_role, search_audit_log, search_ussd_sessions, get_ussd_session_detail). Internal callers were revoked in migration 2026-06-11.
